Kifa.Tools.SubUtil 8.2.2+a59ace974a54238d2996f0f55bf7c0b654d23ddb

  generate    Generate subtitle.

  fix         Fix subtitle. This includes the function of subx clean.

  update      Update subtitle with given modification.

  clean       Clean subtitle file. Currently it cleans up new line symbols.

  import      Import files from /Sources folder with resource id.

  extract     Extract subtitle from video files.

  sync        Sync subtitle to be align with another subtitle.

  subcat      Download subtitle files from https://www.subtitlecat.com/.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

commands.payload:
Kifa.Tools.SubUtil 8.2.2+a59ace974a54238d2996f0f55bf7c0b654d23ddb
Copyright © 2015-2022 Kimi-Arthur

  generate    Generate subtitle.

  fix         Fix subtitle. This includes the function of subx clean.

  update      Update subtitle with given modification.

  clean       Clean subtitle file. Currently it cleans up new line symbols.

  import      Import files from /Sources folder with resource id.

  extract     Extract subtitle from video files.

  sync        Sync subtitle to be align with another subtitle.

  subcat      Download subtitle files from https://www.subtitlecat.com/.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.
